docket_entries.description: DEFAMATION, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WESCOTT, CARL AS TO DEFENDANT HARRIS, MICHELLE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR AUG-05-2015 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-01-2015 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUL-13-2015

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WESCOTT, CARL ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-22-2015 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE AUG-05-2015 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR SEP-22-2015 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610
SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST CARL WESCOTT FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: SEP-22-2015, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE OCT-09-2015. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-22-2015 CONTINUED TO DEC-22-2015 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR DEC-22-2015 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610
SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST CARL WESCOTT FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: DEC-22-2015, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JAN-07-2016. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-22-2015 CONTINUED TO MAR-22-2016 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S); PAY OUTSTANDING SANCTIONS. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR MAR-22-2016 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610
SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST CARL WESCOTT FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: MAR-22-2016, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE APR-08-2016. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-22-2016 CONTINUED TO JUN-21-2016 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S); PAY OUTSTANDING SANCTIONS. THE MAR-22-2016 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR JUN-21-2016 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING JUN-21-2016 AT 10:30 AM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. GOVERNMENT CODE 68608(B) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-22-2016 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Court ordered case dismissed pursuant to government code section 68608(b). JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk KTom. Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-24-2016 Continued To Jun-21-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Self-represented Plaintiff Carl Wescott is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to Jun-21-2016 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk RWoods. Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-23-2015 Continued To Mar-22-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Self-represented Plaintiff Carl Wescott is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is reset to MAR-22-2016 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk MOlopernes/K. Tom. Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-24-2015 Continued To Dec-22-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is reset to Dec-22-2015 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk EBura/KTom. Proceedings not reported. (610)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-21-2015 Set For Order To Show Cause On Sep-22-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
